titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records
Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Sunday June 4, 2023 at 07:11

did.unittitle: Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, School of Medicine, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of proposals, specifications, correspondence, memoranda, reports, schedules, drawings, and administrative records, maintained by the Yale School of Medicine's Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, documenting construction and renovation projects for Yale School of Medicine buildings. Also included is detailed information about the design and installation of mechanical, laboratory, and other equipment and systems.

corpname.part: Yale University. School of Medicine. Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-A (YRG 46-A), Records and materials broadly documenting Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, School of Medicine, Yale University, Records (RU 1070). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by project.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of proposals, specifications, correspondence, memoranda, reports, schedules, drawings, and administrative records, maintained by the Yale School of Medicine's Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation, documenting construction and renovation projects for Yale School of Medicine buildings. Also included is detailed information about the design and installation of mechanical, laboratory, and other equipment and systems.

corpname.part: Yale University. School of Medicine. Office of Facilities Construction and Renovation

did.unittitle: Yale New haven Med Ext. Sign Program
SHM I Wing LEPH, Hope, YPB YSM Lighting
SHM MXL Fire alarms Sys Upgrade
SHM B1/B3, C, E, C2 Graphics
SHM I / WWW Rooftop Combined Rooftop
YPI Bldg One Tenant Fit Up
FMB / BML / LMP Corridor Stair Improv.
SHM B Wing 1st Fl East Entrance
ESH Dorm and Apt Renov (Box 2 of 5)
ESH Dorm and Apt Renov (Box 4 of 5)
ESH Apt 104 and ADA Fire Sep.
SHM IE 41 E and F (SHM IE 25)
SHM I Wing Addition, CSC (spinoff) Box 1 of 2
CAB W/T Req 41-43 and W/T 003-1 (sub job)
